generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical current (I_M) into rotational torque (\u03c4_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance Gearbox : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Multi-stage gearbox system (standard + cycloidal) reducing torque and transmitting rotational motion with critical friction modeling role in mechanical energy transfer"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder measuring angular position and velocity of the motor for torque/velocity analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorVelocityData, MotorPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder measuring angular position and velocity of the gearbox output for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxVelocityData, GearboxPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to derive motor torque (\u03c4_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data - Structural Models
instance StructuralBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) describing motor + gearbox system with rotational (torque/velocity) and current flows"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance StructuralIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (IBD) detailing motor + gearbox system structure with first axis representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

// C10: Models/Data - Behavioral Models
instance MotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model for motor dynamics (ideal vs. friction-affected behavior)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction models in MATLAB/Simulink for gearbox friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C10: Models/Data - Simulated Data
instance ReferenceOutputSimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated reference outputs (\u03c4_G, \u03c4_out) from friction-free motor/gearbox models"
]

instance FrictionAffectedSimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Friction-affected outputs (\u02c6\u03c4_M, \u02c6\u03c4_G, \u02c6\u03c4_out) from simulation models accounting for gearbox friction"
]

instance ReferenceOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated reference outputs (\u03c4_G, \u03c4_out) from friction-free motor/gearbox models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ReferenceOutputSimulationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionAffectedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Friction-affected outputs (\u02c6\u03c4_M, \u02c6\u03c4_G, \u02c6\u03c4_out) from simulation models accounting for gearbox friction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionAffectedSimulationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C10: Models/Data - Measured Data
instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from motor current sensors via Siemens SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor torque (\u03c4_M) derived from current measurements using motor-specific constants"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity (\u03c9) from encoder signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position from encoder signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MetadataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata tracking source origin (encoder/simulation) and computation methods for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ReferenceOutputSimulationData
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionAffectedSimulationData
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for creating SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) representations"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralBDD, StructuralIBD
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink platform for motor dynamics and friction modeling simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorDynamicsModel, FrictionModel
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical components to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables MeasuredCurrentData, MeasuredTorqueData, MeasuredVelocityData, MeasuredPositionData, MetadataData
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard for unified visualization of torque/velocity comparisons and friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ModelBasedSystemsEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies (RFLP, SysML) for system integration and twinning process"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralBDD, MotorDynamicsModel, FrictionModel
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction losses in the gearbox using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDetectionInsight, ModelRefinementAction
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of friction models into control algorithms to reduce positional errors (up to 30% attributed to friction)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PositionalAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization dashboard comparing measured vs. simulated data (torque, angular velocity) for friction validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataComparisonInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of friction components (static, kinetic, viscous) in the gearbox transmission"
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous updating of friction models during operation via real-time data integration"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PositionalAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction parameters to maintain motion accuracy during operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison between measured and simulated data to detect friction loss and validate model accuracy"
]

// C17: Environment
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Motor, Gearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance IndustrialRobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 six-axis serial robot with 2m workspace, ±10.1mm positional accuracy, and ±10.06mm path repeatability"
    base:contains RobotAxisEnvironment
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** time scale:
  - **Data Acquisition Rate**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, encoders) is streamed at high frequency (implied by live measurements and continuous model refinement).
  - **Model Update Frequency**: Friction models are dynamically updated during operation to account for wear, load changes, or environmental factors (e.g., temperature).
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces and model outputs are synchronized with physical system events (e.g., robot motion commands) to ensure causality in analysis."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **centralized and purpose-driven**:
  - **Core Components**: A single digital shadow for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, integrating live data, simulation models, and visualization.
  - **Orchestration**: Data flows unidirectionally from physical sensors to the DT (digital shadow) for passive analysis, with no feedback loops to the physical system (as per digital shadow definition)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the **operational phase** of the physical system:
  - **Representation Phase**: The DT represents the robot as **operated** (actual behavior with friction effects), not as designed or manufactured.
  - **Lifecycle Scope**: The focus is on **continuous improvement** of friction models during robot operation to enhance motion accuracy, with no explicit mention of design or manufacturing phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Verification**: Comparison of measured vs. simulated data to validate friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Use of dual encoders to infer elasticity/friction in the gearbox drive train.
  - **Model Accuracy**: White-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models are combined to account for wear, load, and temperature effects, with traceability ensuring causality in deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection uses:
  - **Protocol**: MQTT for real-time data streaming from robot sensors to the DT.
  - **Network Architecture**: Implied real-time communication between physical sensors and digital shadow components (no explicit details on network topology or protocols beyond MQTT)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT incorporates:
  - **Modeling Standards**: SysML for system modeling, AAS for integration.
  - **Data Protocols**: MQTT for real-time data exchange.
  - **Methodologies**: MBSE (e.g., RFLP, SysML) and digital shadow reference models (DSRM) for consistency."
]
